name: Leader
official_rules_text: A miniature with the Leader keyword is treated as a unit’s unit leader for all rules purposes. If a miniature with the Leader keyword and a Wound threshold of 2 or more is defeated while in a unit with a Wound threshold of 1, replace 1 of the remaining miniatures in that unit as normal, then assign the miniature with the Leader keyword 1 Wound token. Each unit may only equip 1 upgrade card with the Leader keyword.
